data.body:
G4 container child-consistency audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child 59ef "Verified fake: contract tests run against BOTH real and fake AcliClient"), all 7 cross-child interaction modes checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/822a/8937/fe57) under the high-confidence / benign-reading filter, repo-corroborated. VERDICT: clean pairing — no G4 cross-child finding; findings list EMPTY.

REPO CORROBORATION (59ef's contracted surface is real and not stranded, and the producer/verifier split is grounded):
- The four enrichment methods 59ef's dual-run harness contracts resolve on BOTH the real client and fe57's fake: real — acli_graph.py get_issuelinks_map (L391) + get_comment_map/get_parent_map (per prior audits L289/L189) and search_issues; fake — tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/jira_contract/_fakes.py search_issues (L50), get_comment_map (L56), get_issuelinks_map (L59), get_parent_map (L62), with signatures mirroring the real client (the fake docstring L32-38: "returns a deep copy of the fixture so … the SHAPE returned is the fixture's, untouched" — exactly the unmassaged fidelity 59ef's contract pins).
- 59ef declares depends_on fe57 (confirmed in deps): fe57 BUILDS the fake, 59ef VERIFIES it. As-shipped file_impact (tests/_jira_shape_contract.py [shared contract], jira_contract/test_verified_fake_contract.py [fake half + divergent-fake negative test], tests/external/test_verified_fake_contract_live.py [live half, external-gated]) is DISJOINT from every sibling's edits.

7-MODE WALK (parent × 59ef):
- Implicit shared state — BENIGN. 59ef's three test files are net-new; it only READS acli_graph.py (no co-edit) and CONSUMES fe57's FakeAcliClient. Clean producer/verifier split over the declared depends_on fe57 edge; no shared mutable write. Disjoint from 8937 (_snapshot_schema.py/test_snapshot_contract.py/fetcher.py), 33d0/2359 (outbound applier cluster), 822a (probe/test_roundtrip.py), fe57 (_fakes.py/fixtures/capture script).
- Conflicting assumptions — BENIGN. fe57 AC2 ("fake serves fixtures through production fetch_snapshot enrichment with NO shape transformation") and 59ef AC2 ("the fake FAILS the contract if its return shape diverges from the real client's") are mutually reinforcing — an unmassaged, fixture-faithful fake is precisely what passes 59ef's real-vs-fake shape contract. 59ef contracts only the INBOUND enrichment surface; the outbound labels list-vs-count representation matter (the epic's one real cross-child seam, localized to 33d0↔2359 and resolved as-shipped via integer counters) neither touches nor is depended on by 59ef.
- Dependency gap — BENIGN. 59ef correctly declares depends_on fe57 (needs the fake for the hermetic leg). Fixture capture (→fe57) and the snapshot round-trip (→8937) are explicitly scoped OUT; the dual-run harness stands up without 8937's schema or 822a's probe. The one externally-new capability (optional Jira-Cloud OpenAPI validation) was dropped per the ticket's plan-review remediation, so it introduces no unmet external dependency. No missing input edge.
- Scope overlap — BENIGN. 59ef contracts the enrichment METHODS' return shape (client surface, tests/_jira_shape_contract.py); 8937 contracts the assembled SNAPSHOT-ENTRY schema after fetch (test_snapshot_contract.py); 822a asserts inbound↔outbound behavioral ROUND-TRIP (test_roundtrip.py). Three distinct, complementary surfaces on distinct files — not duplicative; 59ef declares the round-trip and fixture-capture OUT consistently.
- Ordering violation — BENIGN. The only hard ordering edge (the fake must exist before its verifier) is captured by depends_on fe57. 59ef is not entangled in the 33d0↔2359 same-region outbound-applier sequencing cluster (different files/surface entirely).
- Consumer impact — BENIGN. 59ef AC4 makes the live leg opt-in (REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL + external marker) and guards against flaking/slowing the default suite (consistent with parent SC "suite stays lean" / "no net increase in brittle tests"); AC3 asserts structure/type (keys + JSON primitive types), not exact values, imposing no brittle expectation on any consumer. The negative divergent-fake test enforces AC2 hermetically in the default suite.
- Residual references — BENIGN. All four contracted methods exist on both the real client and fe57's fake (verified above). 33d0's collapse/deletion targets the OUTBOUND typed-leaf applier (apply_outbound.py parallel logic), NOT the INBOUND enrichment methods 59ef contracts, so its deletion strands nothing here. No dangling reference.

The roster-level parent anti-change-detector-guardrail criterion is a G3 COVERAGE matter — and per the parent AC's verbatim "(owned by story B)" clause is owned by 8937 — not a G4 cross-child inconsistency, so it is not addressed here.

VERDICT for this pairing (parent × 59ef): no G4 cross-child finding; all 7 interaction modes read benign under the high-confidence / benign-reading filter. Findings list EMPTY.
